import type { Manifest } from '../manifest' import type { MakeRouteMatch } from '../Matches' export interface DehydratedMatch { i: MakeRouteMatch['id'] b?: MakeRouteMatch['__beforeLoadContext'] l?: MakeRouteMatch['loaderData'] e?: MakeRouteMatch['error'] u: MakeRouteMatch['updatedAt'] s: MakeRouteMatch['status'] ssr?: MakeRouteMatch['ssr'] g?: true } export interface DehydratedRouter { manifest: Manifest | undefined dehydratedData?: any lastMatchId?: string matches: Array<DehydratedMatch> } export interface TsrSsrGlobal { router?: DehydratedRouter // Signal that router hydration is complete h: () => void // Signal that stream has ended e: () => void // Cleanup all hydration resources and scripts c: () => void // p: Push script into buffer or execute immediately p: (script: () => void) => void buffer: Array<() => void> // custom transformers, shortened since this is sent for each streamed value that needs a custom transformer t?: Map<string, (value: any) => any> // this flag indicates whether the transformers were initialized initialized?: boolean // router is hydrated and doesnt need the streamed values anymore hydrated?: boolean // stream has ended streamEnded?: boolean }
